As of 2026-04-01, use the provided offline evidence pack to judge which
A-share names are direct beneficiaries, indirect beneficiaries, mixed, or
likely harmed under a Middle East oil and shipping shock.

Keep `physical disruption` separate from `risk premium`, and keep
`confirmed`, `likely`, and `inference only` visibly separate. The output should
stay practical for event-driven equity research rather than generic macro
commentary.
